reviews.comment:
Cargar combustible BIEN. Fuimos a tomar un café ahí y no tenían facturas o algo para acompañar . Nos dijeron que ya cerraban. NO me gustó la atención más aún siendo el Automóvil Club (ACA).

(Translated by Google)
Fueling up was OK. We went there for coffee and they didn't have any receipts or anything to go with it. They told us they were closing. I didn't like the service, especially since it's the Automobile Club (ACA).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16461763455653012667/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdHF1RURREAE
